title: Unarmed Strike

markdown:
# Unarmed Strike

Instead of using a weapon to make a melee attack, you can use a punch, kick, head-butt, or similar forceful blow. In game terms, this is an Unarmed Strike—a melee attack that involves you using your body to damage, grapple, or shove a target within 5 feet of you.

Whenever you use your Unarmed Strike, choose one of the following options for its effect.

### Damage

You make an attack roll against the target. Your bonus to the roll equals your Strength modifier plus your [[proficiency Bonus]]. On a hit, the target takes Bludgeoning damage equal to 1 plus your Strength modifier.

### Grapple

The target must succeed on a Strength or Dexterity [[saving_throw throw]] (it chooses which), or it has the [[grappled]] condition. The DC for the [[saving_throw throw]] and any escape attempts equals 8 plus your Strength modifier and [[proficiency Bonus]]. This grapple is possible only if the target is no more than one size larger than you and if you have a hand free to grab it.

### Shove

The target must succeed on a Strength or Dexterity [[saving_throw throw]] (it chooses which), or you either push it 5 feet away or cause it to have the [[prone]] condition. The DC for the [[saving_throw throw]] equals 8 plus your Strength modifier and [[proficiency Bonus]]. This shove is possible only if the target is no more than one size larger than you.
